name: GSD Holding A.S.
summary: GSD Holding A.S., through its subsidiaries, provides banking and factoring products and services. The company shipping, energy, and education businesses. The company was formerly known as GSD Dis Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to GSD Holding A.S. in November 1996. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
